    • services/api/folderServices
    • FolderService

    Variable FolderServiceConst

    FolderService: {
        addFolder(
            name: string,
            parentFolderID: string | null,
            workspaceID: string | null,
        ): Promise<any>;
        deleteFolder(folderID: string): Promise<any>;
        getAllFoldersOfUser(): Promise<any>;
        getAllFoldersOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>;
        saveFolder(
            data: {
                description?: string;
                id: string;
                name?: string;
                parentFolderID?: string;
            },
        ): Promise<any>;
    } = ...

    Client for the folder endpoints (create, update, delete, list). Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • addFolder: function
      • addFolder(
            name: string,
            parentFolderID: string | null,
            workspaceID: string | null,
        ): Promise<any>

        Creates a new folder, optionally nested and/or inside a workspace.

        Parameters

        • name: string

          Folder name.

        • parentFolderID: string | null

          Parent folder, or null for the root.

        • workspaceID: string | null

          Target workspace, or null for a personal folder.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The created folder.

        • Defined in services/api/folderServices.ts:21
    • deleteFolder: function
      • deleteFolder(folderID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes a folder together with its sub-folders and notes (recursive soft-delete on the server).

        Parameters

        • folderID: string

          The root folder to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server confirmation payload.

        • Defined in services/api/folderServices.ts:78
    • getAllFoldersOfUser: function
      • getAllFoldersOfUser(): Promise<any>

        Returns all of the current user's personal folders.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of folders.

        • Defined in services/api/folderServices.ts:97
    • getAllFoldersOfWorkspace: function
      • getAllFoldersOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns all folders of a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace whose folders are requested.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of folders.

        • Defined in services/api/folderServices.ts:115
    • saveFolder: function
      • saveFolder(
            data: {
                description?: string;
                id: string;
                name?: string;
                parentFolderID?: string;
            },
        ): Promise<any>

        Updates a folder (only provided fields are changed; an empty parent moves it to the root).

        Parameters

        • data: { description?: string; id: string; name?: string; parentFolderID?: string }

          The folder ID plus the fields to change.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated folder.

        • Defined in services/api/folderServices.ts:46
